name: BLT Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 7 oz. package of cooked and drained elbow macaroni,
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise (or salad dressing), chili sauce, lemon juice, chicken bouillon, and sugar.
2. Stir in macaroni, tomato, and onions.
3. Cover; chill.
4. Just before serving, stir in lettuce and bacon.
5. Refrigerate leftovers.
